beats.say: Watch what happens at the highest point of the trajectory. Something magical occurs — the vertical velocity hits exactly zero.

card.content: At the peak, $v_y = 0$ while $v_x$ remains constant

beats.say: At this instant, the arrow moves purely horizontally at thirty-four point six meters per second. No vertical motion at all — just smooth horizontal gliding.
Here's the beautiful symmetry of projectile motion: the time it takes to reach the peak equals the time to fall back down. What goes up must come down, and it takes exactly the same duration.

card.content: Time symmetry: $t_{up} = t_{down}$, so total flight time is $2t_{peak}$
